query: INSERT INTO practiceTestQuestions (practiceTestId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation) SELECT id, 'What is the powerhouse of the cell?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Nucleus', 'B) Mitochondria', 'C) Ribosome', 'D) Chloroplast'), 'B', 'The mitochondria is responsible for producing energy (ATP) for the cell.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Science Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which of the following is a renewable energy source?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Coal', 'B) Natural gas', 'C) Solar energy', 'D) Oil'), 'C', 'Solar energy is renewable because the sun continuously provides energy.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Science Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the chemical formula for water?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) H₂O', 'B) CO₂', 'C) O₂', 'D) H₂O₂'), 'A', 'Water consists of 2 hydrogen atoms and 1 oxygen atom, represented as H₂O.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Science Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Which planet is closest to the Sun?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) Venus', 'B) Mercury', 'C) Earth', 'D) Mars'), 'B', 'Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun in our solar system.' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Science Practice Test 1';
